implementing_department: Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Himachal Pradesh
description: A subsidy-based goat farming scheme to enhance income generation and meat production among economically weaker rural communities.
eligibility: Small or marginal farmer, landless laborer, SC/ST/Women/BPL

steps: Read guidelines and agree to terms
Fill application form and upload documents

additional_notes: At least 30% beneficiaries must be women.
